input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.2.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.2.1.1
            TITLE: the ses is a supplement to the formula sae rules and may provide guidance or further details

            CONTENT:
            rule F.2.1.1: The SES is a supplement to the Formula SAE Rules and may provide guidance or further details
F.2.1.1 The SES is a supplement to the Formula SAE Rules and may provide guidance or further details 
in addition to those of the Formula SAE Rules.

final_answer: rule F.2.1.1: The SES is a supplement to the Formula SAE Rules and may provide guidance or further details F.2.1.1 The SES is a supplement to the Formula SAE Rules and may provide guidance or further details in addition to those of the Formula SAE Rules.
